sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49887" key="i)diotope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰδῐο-τοπέω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐδ]</pron>, Astrol., <sense id="n49887.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">occupy a congenial position in the zodiac</tr_>, <pb n="819" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:71:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71.7</biblScope> </bibl>:</sense> </entryFree>
